taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Mouth, Pharynx & Palate anatomy

words.clue: Duct that opens opposite upper 2nd molar in the vestibule
Nerve providing general sensation to the anterior two-thirds of the tongue
Cranial nerve supplying motor innervation to all tongue muscles except palatoglossus
Ring of lymphoid tissue guarding the pharyngeal entrance
Muscle that is the primary protrusor of the tongue
Nerve mediating the afferent limb of the gag reflex
Weak area in the pharyngeal wall where Zenker diverticulum occurs
Nerve providing taste to the anterior two-thirds of the tongue via the lingual nerve
Peritonsillar abscess is also known by this name
Muscular diaphragm forming the floor of the mouth

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
Excellent! You have a strong grasp of this topic.
